ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment grouping multiple runs */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision metric for the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall metric for the model */,
  "fscore" REAL /* F-score metric for the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy metric for the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for the model run */,
  "run_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model run was executed */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken for training the model */,
  "validation_score" REAL /* Validation score of the model */,
  "test_score" REAL /* Test score of the model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_algorithm FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_runs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "num_features" INTEGER /* Number of features in the dataset */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., tabular, image) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "library" TEXT /* Library used for the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model run */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter (e.g., integer, float) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preprocessing_steps" (
  "preprocessing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preprocessing step */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model run */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the preprocessing step */,
  "step_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the step was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preprocessing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_preprocessing_steps_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model run */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model run was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or tool used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES model_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each model run
Reference to the experiment grouping multiple runs
Reference to the dataset used for the model run
Timestamp when the model run was executed
